summary: Tested AI Gate feature: backend endpoints (test-gate, gated-emails, restore, sync status), gate_email function, Settings page new sections, and Dashboard sync log modal. All 5 backend tests pass. Settings page shows AI Gate Tests and Filtered Emails sections correctly. Dashboard sync-log-btn is conditionally rendered only after a sync occurs (expected behavior).
critical_code_review_comments: sync-log-btn only renders when lastSynced is truthy (user has completed a sync). This is correct — the test user has never synced Gmail so the button is absent. Verified modal code is present in Dashboard.jsx lines 730-780 with all required labels.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (Settings sections verified; sync-log-btn not testable without Gmail sync)

test_credentials: JWT from review_request used for all tests
